calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Continued To Oct-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Kevin Eikenberry, Esq. for Plaintiff: Thomas Franciose, also present.
Austin Bosarge, Esq. for Defendant: Dominic Montgomery, also present.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff to Dismissed with prejudice upon received of promissory note in the amount of $17,500.00, with annual interest rate of 6% for one year term of interest only, and 5% of late fee, if payment is not made within 10 days of the due date of the note.
If full payment of $15,000.00 made within 3 months from the date of the note, then there is no interest added. Note is secured by Deed of Trust of the real property in Santa Rosa, under Mrs. Montgomery's name, and after the appraisals of the subject property and property next door, along with the title report, and approval of plaintiff, matter to be dismissed, if not matter is set for trial on Oct. 31, 2005.
Each to bear own fees and costs.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial Date is continued by the PJ to Oct. 31, 2005.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-20-2005 Set For Trial On Sep-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
